articles.title: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
articles.summary: “British Bases Out” is the slogan of Cypriot protesters after a drone strike targeted the RAF Akrotiri airbase.

articles.title: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
articles.summary: Police say they are investigating other motives after the blast caused minor damage to the embassy building.

articles.title: Boy, 12, among six dead as tornadoes hit Michigan and Oklahoma
articles.summary: The storms uprooted trees, downed power lines, damaged buildings and ripped the roofs off some houses.

articles.title: Swiss reject right-wing plan to cut licence fee for public broadcaster
articles.summary: More than 60% voters said they wanted to keep the current licence fee levels, initial projections show.

articles.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah unseats Nepal's ex-PM as he heads for victory
articles.summary: Thursday's general election was the first since violent youth-led protests toppled the government in September.

articles.title: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
articles.summary: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

articles.title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
articles.summary: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

articles.title: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war
articles.summary: Seyed Ali Mousavi says Iran has a "right to self-defence" if the UK directly joins US-Israeli attacks.

articles.title: Russian strike on Kharkiv apartment block kills ten
articles.summary: Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelensky says other people - including children - are injured as rescuers continue to search through rubble.

articles.title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
articles.summary: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.
